column1: # Sentence patterns — productive grammar that attaches to a verb/noun/clause.
# Belongs here: bound patterns shown with a 〜 placeholder (〜たい, 〜てしまう,
# 〜べき, 〜ように) and core function words (だ, ている, という, ください).
# Conjugation paradigms of a specific part of speech live in their own
# *-conjugation decks; idiomatic set phrases go in expression/idioms.tsv.

column4: have done before; have the experience of
